case_title: SAN FRANCISCO WALDORF SCHOOL ASSOCIATION (SFWSA) VS. SUSAN KIM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO WALDORF SCHOOL ASSOCIATION (SFWSA) AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
